_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 and 2 in Canada.

_contextSnippet: The final model for the SF-36 PCS had age, sex, pain interference score, known plexiform neurofibroma, known spinal tumor, optic glioma, history of MPNST, and history of other cancers, with R2: 0.60 and P < .001. For the SF-36 MCS, the final model had... R2: 0.36 and P = .0003. For the PedsQL model... R2: 0.44 and P < .0001.
details: Successfully used for regression modeling with R² values of 0.60 for SF-36 PCS model, 0.36 for SF-36 MCS model, and 0.44 for PedsQL model in NF1 patients.
